name: interceptors_demo_mcpserver

inlineContent.description: Interceptors demo MCP server with web search, weather, geocoding, currency exchange, and time tools

tools.name: fetch_webpage
tools.description: Fetches content from a web page URL

tools.name: geocode_location
tools.description: Geocodes a location string to coordinates

tools.name: reverse_geocode
tools.description: Reverse geocodes coordinates to a location

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Gets current weather for a location

tools.name: get_ip_info
tools.description: Gets information about an IP address

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Performs a web search and returns results

tools.name: get_current_time
tools.description: Gets the current time for a timezone

tools.name: get_public_holidays
tools.description: Gets public holidays for a country and year

description: Interceptors demo MCP server with web search, weather, geocoding, currency exchange, and time tools
